nasb.text: ‘But if he cannot afford a lamb, then he shall bring to the Lord his guilt offering for that in which he has sinned, two turtledoves or two young pigeons, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering.

esv.text: “But if he cannot afford a lamb, then he shall bring to the Lord as his compensation for the sin that he has committed two turtledoves or two pigeons, one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering.

cnv.text: “他的經濟能力若是不夠獻一隻羊，他就要為所犯的罪，帶兩隻斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿到耶和華面前作贖愆祭，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭。

ccb.text: “他若献不起羊，就要献给耶和华两只斑鸠或两只雏鸽，一只作赎罪祭，一只作燔祭。
